description_long: A bearded adult male figure is dressed in a stylized warrior outfit reminiscent of historical or fantasy settings. He wears a red turban, a single armored pauldron on his right shoulder, and a leather harness across his chest. His attire includes a decorated tunic with a patterned apron, bracers on both forearms, and tall, laced boots. A sword is sheathed on his back, and a dagger is strapped to his waist, suggesting he is equipped for combat. The figure's stance is upright and alert, with arms slightly bent and hands relaxed at his sides.
description: A bearded adult male in a warrior outfit with a red turban, armored shoulder, and weapons, standing upright and alert.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red turban, beard, armored right shoulder, chest harness, decorated tunic, and visible weapons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the turban, beard, and the sword sheathed on his back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the sword's full length, back harness, and the detailed back of the tunic and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the armored pauldron, bracers, and the layered skirt of the tunic.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy warrior attire with a turban, armored pauldron, bracers, decorated tunic, and tall boots
attribute_hairstyle: long full beard, hair covered by turban
